hydrology.title: NKZ Water Studio
hydrology.noData: No hydrological data available for this parcel
hydrology.subtitle: Watershed analysis and hydrological design tools for precision agriculture.
hydrology.step1Desc: Open the 3D viewer and click on any AgriParcel to activate the hydrology tools.
hydrology.step2Desc: The system downloads high-res elevation data and computes watershed, slope and TWI rasters.
hydrology.step3Desc: Use the design tools to place keylines, ponds, swales and check dams. Export to GIS-routing, GPX or KML.
hydrology.ctaText: All design tools are available in the 3D viewer when a parcel is selected.
hydrology.notAuthenticated: Sign in to access the viewer.
hydrology.twiError: Could not load the TWI overlay
